title: Archive a project board without it deleting/archiving from a Portfolio
excerpt: Add the feature to archive a project board without it getting deleted/archived/removed from the Portfolio it is connected to. I have many connected boards set up on the Portfolio, and archiving a project-board, which the…

posts.author: paulmatsushima (Paul Matsushima)
posts.cookedHtml: Add the feature to archive a project board without it getting deleted/archived/removed from the Portfolio it is connected to. I have many connected boards set up on the Portfolio, and archiving a project-board, which then removes the item from the portfolio, loses all those connections. Not an ideal situation.
